summary: Media Master ecosystem (DSG TV / Vibe Radio / DSG Music Group / AI Scout) tested across 23 backend pytest cases + frontend smoke. 22/23 backend pass (1 test-isolation flake on radio_now_playing skip_bid leftover, not a product bug). All 4 frontend pages render correctly post-login. Critical 21+ age-gate on After Dark fires correctly (403 age_verification_required).

minor.issue: Test test_radio_now_playing asserts skip_bid is None but a prior in-suite skip-bid test seeds an active bid. Test isolation issue only — endpoint correctly returns the active bid doc. Real product behavior is correct.

action_items: (Optional) Tighten test_radio_now_playing isolation: precondition the skip_bids collection to empty for the station, or split the bid-creation test into its own module.
Note: /media-master and sub-pages require an authenticated session; unauthenticated visitors are redirected to /login (verified behavior, not a bug).
critical_code_review_comments: media_master.py constructs its own AsyncIOMotorClient at import time (line 41-43) instead of reusing the shared db handle from lifespan/registry. Works but couples this module to env at import time and bypasses connection-pool sharing — minor.
After Dark 21+ gate correctly fails-closed when age_verification service has no record. Good safety posture.
PIN is SHA-256 hashed (not bcrypt). For a 4-8 digit PIN this is brute-forceable offline if hash leaks. Consider HMAC with server secret or bcrypt for production. Not blocking for MVP.
compute_hype_score is pure & deterministic — verified: 100*1 + 5*2.5 = 112.5 -> ambient; 1500 + 50*2.5 = 1625 -> auto_clip; 12000 + 500*2.5 = 13250 -> break_in. Matches spec.
seed_data_creation: TEST_media_<uuid> and TEST_chair_<uuid> users with credits_balance=1,000,000 created and cleaned up by module-scoped fixture in test_media_master_jan2026.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_media_master_jan2026.py covers all 19 Media Master endpoints. To re-run: `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_media_master_jan2026.py -v`. The test_radio_now_playing assertion is order-sensitive — if test_skip_bid_success runs first the skip_bid won't be null. Frontend hub at /media-master is auth-gated. Concierge bubble only renders for tier in {genesis, apex} (verified hidden for non-VIP beta tester).
verified_features: GET /constants returns 5 channels + 3 stations + 3 studios + all locked numerics
GET /tv/channels returns 5 (2 with requires_paywall=true: after-dark + nightmare-club)
POST /tv/unlock/after-dark without verified 21+ -> 403 age_verification_required (CRITICAL SAFETY VERIFIED)
GET /music/artists returns list (empty in test env)
POST /music/sponsor idempotent=false on first, idempotent=true on re-call
POST /scout/ingest score<1000 -> ambient, no clip, no alert
Frontend /media-master: hub renders, 4 sections present, 5 channels + 3 stations + 3 studios tiles
Frontend /dsg-tv/after-dark: shows Unlock + Secondary PIN inputs + 21+ banner
Frontend /music-group: 3 studio cards with ₵2k/₵3k/₵5k + Sponsor input
VipConcierge correctly hidden for non-VIP beta tester
